name: GIGABYTE B760I AORUS PRO DDR4 Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Support DDR4-5333(OC) - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 2x M.2 Socket3 - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C+A - HDMI 2.0 - DisplayPort 1.2 - Intel 2.5G LAN - Intel Wi-Fi 6E 802.11ax
shortName: GIGABYTE B760I AORUS PRO DDR4 Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: Mini-ITX motherboard for Intel LGA 1700 processors with DDR4 support, PCIe 4.0, and Wi-Fi 6E connectivity.
